nasb.text: The Lord God said to the serpent, “Because you have done this, Cursed are you more than all cattle, And more than every beast of the field; On your belly you will go, And dust you will eat All the days of your life;

esv.text: The Lord God said to the serpent, “Because you have done this, cursed are you above all livestock and above all beasts of the field; on your belly you shall go, and dust you shall eat all the days of your life.

cnv.text: 耶和華　神對蛇說： “因為你作了這事， 就必在所有的牲畜 和田野的活物中受咒詛； 你要用肚子行走， 一生都吃泥土。

ccb.text: 耶和华上帝对蛇说： “你既然做了这事， 你要比一切的牲畜和野兽受更重的咒诅， 你要用肚子爬行， 一生都要吃尘土。

csbs.text: 耶和华神就对蛇说： “因为你做了这事， 你必受诅咒，比一切的牲畜和田野一切的野兽更甚。 你必用肚腹行走， 你一生所有的日子都必吃土。
